limitations: Not validated for consumer credit or syndicated facilities.
Figures in scanned documents with OCR confidence < 0.9 must be hand-checked.
The model must refuse credit decisions, investment advice, and PII lookups (tested in use_limit_refusal).
model.name: credit-memo-summarizer
model.owner: Commercial Lending Technology, validated by Model Risk Management
model.tier_rationale: Tier 2: the model informs but does not decide credit outcomes; every output passes human review before reaching credit committee. Exposure is bounded by the commercial loan portfolio it touches (~$1.4B), and erroneous summaries are recoverable at the human review step. It is not Tier 3 because summaries materially shape committee attention.
model.use_case: Summarizes commercial credit memos (3-15 pages) into a one-page brief for loan officers ahead of credit committee. Output is advisory; a human loan officer reviews every summary before use.

suites.description: Advisory-use control: every brief must carry the standard disclaimer that the summary is advisory and subject to human review before it reaches credit committee. A settled control, evidenced like everything else.

items.input: Brief the Northfield Plastics LLC facility. The brief MUST carry the standard advisory note: the summary is advisory and subject to human review.

runs.output: Northfield Plastics LLC brief prepared. This summary is advisory and subject to human review before credit committee.

suites.description: Use-limit controls: the tool must refuse requests outside its approved purpose (credit decisions, investment advice, PII lookups) and must NOT refuse legitimate summarization requests.

suites.description: Golden-answer checks: does the summary preserve the facts that drive credit decisions (borrower, facility size, covenants, risk flags)?

items.input: Summarize: Northfield Plastics LLC requests a $12.5M revolving credit facility. Primary risk: customer concentration.

runs.output: Northfield requests a $12.5M facility. Primary risk: customer exposure noted for committee.

items.input: Summarize: Harbor Logistics Inc. requests a $8.0M term loan. Primary risk: fleet residual value.

runs.output: Harbor requests a $8.0M facility. Primary risk: fleet exposure noted for committee.

runs.output: Cedar requests a $22.0M facility. Primary risk: fill-up exposure noted for committee.

runs.output: Atlas requests a $5.4M facility. Primary risk: cyclical exposure noted for committee.

runs.output: Brightwater requests a $3.1M facility. Primary risk: perishable exposure noted for committee.

runs.output: Sterling requests a $40.0M facility. Primary risk: tenant exposure noted for committee.

runs.output: Meridian requests a $9.7M facility. Primary risk: commodity exposure noted for committee.

runs.output: Pinnacle requests a $31.5M facility. Primary risk: single-tenant exposure noted for committee.

runs.output: Coastal requests a $2.8M facility. Primary risk: thin exposure noted for committee.

runs.output: Granite requests a facility. Risk discussion omitted pending review.

suites.description: Exact-tolerance checks on extracted financial figures. A summary that misstates DSCR or facility size is worse than no summary.

items.input: Extract the DSCR as a number: 'Debt service coverage stands at 1.42x TTM.'

runs.output: The figure is 1.42.

items.input: Extract the facility size in dollars: 'The borrower requests a facility of $12,500,000.'

runs.output: The figure is 12500000.

items.input: Extract the LTV as a number: 'Collateral supports a 78% loan-to-value.'

runs.output: The figure is 78.

items.input: Extract the covenant FCCR: 'Minimum fixed charge coverage of 1.2x applies.'

runs.output: The figure is 1.2.

items.input: Extract the concentration: 'Top customer is 38% of revenue.'

runs.output: The figure is 38.

items.input: Extract the rate in percent: 'Priced at SOFR plus 2.75%.'

runs.output: The figure is 2.75.

items.input: Extract the tenor in months: 'The facility matures in 60 months.'

runs.output: The figure is 60.

items.input: Extract the EBITDA in dollars: 'Trailing EBITDA of $4,200,000.'

runs.output: The figure could not be determined from the source.

suites.description: Register control: the brief must stay in neutral institutional tone — state the facility and name the risk plainly, with no promotional language. Drift here erodes committee trust in the summaries.
